rulesDemo.advancedSectionNotes: Visible when “Show advanced section” is enabled
rulesDemo.basicOnlyField: Hidden when advanced section is shown
rulesDemo.lockedField: Enabled unless “Force locked mode” is on
rulesDemo.detailWithoutFailWhenUndefined: May appear even when optionalCounter is missing from data
rulesDemo.detailWithFailWhenUndefined: Hidden until optionalCounter is set to 1 or more
